summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Flowtym Data Hub module. All 6 pages tested successfully: Overview, Connectors, Sync, Data, API & Marketplace, and Monitoring. All features working as expected including KPI cards, connector test/sync buttons, filters, charts, event stream, and navigation.
passed_tests: /datahub - Overview page loads with KPI cards (Réservations: 37, Clients: 0, Syncs: 4, Connecteurs: 0/5)
/datahub - Channel distribution chart displays (Direct, Channel Manager, Booking Com, HRS, Airbnb, Expedia)
/datahub - Recent events activity feed shows with timestamps
/datahub - Reservation status breakdown visible (checked Out, checked In, confirmed, cancelled, modified)
/datahub/connectors - All 5 connectors display (Mews PMS, Booking.com, D-EDGE, Stripe, Lighthouse)
/datahub/connectors - Test button works for Mews - shows '[MOCK] Mews PMS connection test successful'
/datahub/connectors - Sync button triggers synchronization - toast 'Sync terminé: 12 enregistrements'
/datahub/connectors - Config button opens modal with API key, Hotel ID, Priority fields
/datahub/sync - Sync history table displays with Date/Heure, Type, Statut, Total, Traités, Erreurs, Durée columns
/datahub/sync - Quick sync cards for all 5 connectors (Mews PMS, Booking.com, D-EDGE, Stripe, Lighthouse)
/datahub/sync - 'Tout synchroniser' button present and functional
/datahub/sync - Connector filter dropdown works
/datahub/data - Reservations tab shows 41 normalized reservations from multiple sources
/datahub/data - Source badges display correctly (mews, dedge, booking_com) with color coding
/datahub/data - Status filter works (filtered to 'Confirmée' shows 10 results)
/datahub/data - Channel filter works (Direct, Booking.com, Channel Manager options)
/datahub/data - Pagination working (Page 1 • 10 résultats)
/datahub/data - Clients and Tarifs tabs present
/datahub/api - API keys management page loads with 2 existing keys
/datahub/api - Marketplace banner 'Bientôt disponible' with Phase 2 badge
/datahub/api - Feature cards (Sécurité OAuth2, Rate Limiting, Accès Global)
/datahub/api - Create new API key works - toast 'Clé API créée avec succès'
/datahub/monitoring - Event stream terminal displays with [RESERVATION_CREATED] events
/datahub/monitoring - Activity charts render (Recharts - Réservations and Syncs)
/datahub/monitoring - Errors chart (24h) renders
/datahub/monitoring - Quick stats cards (Réservations 24h: 41, Syncs 24h: 5, Erreurs: 0)
/datahub/monitoring - Auto-refresh toggle (Live/Pause) works
/datahub/monitoring - Event filter works (Réservations, Synchronisation, Erreurs)
Navigation between all Data Hub pages works correctly via sub-navigation
critical_code_review_comments: API keys in DataHubAPI.jsx are stored in local state - will need backend persistence for production
Chart data in DataHubMonitoring.jsx is mock-generated - should fetch real metrics from backend
Connectors show 0/5 active despite successful tests - may need to persist test results to update status
seed_data_creation: Previous sync operations created 41 reservations from mews, dedge, booking_com sources
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Hub frontend fully tested. All 6 pages working: Overview (KPIs, connectors list, channel chart, activity feed), Connectors (5 connectors with test/sync/config buttons), Sync (history table, quick sync cards), Data (reservations table with filters, pagination), API (keys management, marketplace banner), Monitoring (charts, event stream terminal). Backend connectors are MOCKED. Navigation uses data-testid='datahub-nav-{id}' pattern.

mocked_apis_list: Backend connectors (Mews, Booking.com, D-EDGE, Stripe, Lighthouse) return mocked data
API keys in DataHubAPI.jsx are stored in local React state (not persisted)
Chart data in DataHubMonitoring.jsx is mock-generated

overview_page.kpi_cards: 4 KPI cards with Réservations, Clients, Syncs (24h), Connecteurs
overview_page.channel_chart: Bar chart showing reservation distribution by channel
overview_page.activity_feed: Recent events with timestamps and color-coded indicators
overview_page.status_breakdown: Reservation status counts (checked_out, checked_in, confirmed, cancelled, modified)

connectors_page.connector_cards: 5 cards with icon, name, type, version, description
connectors_page.test_button: Tests connection and shows success message with features
connectors_page.sync_button: Triggers sync and shows toast with record count
connectors_page.config_button: Opens modal with API key, Hotel ID, Priority fields

sync_page.history_table: Shows sync history with status badges (Succès/Échec/Partiel)
sync_page.quick_sync_cards: 5 clickable cards for quick sync per connector

data_page.reservations_tab: Table with confirmation, client, dates, amount, channel, source, status

api_page.marketplace_banner: Coming soon banner with Phase 2 badge
api_page.feature_cards: OAuth2, Rate Limiting, Global Access cards
api_page.api_keys_list: Shows existing keys with masked values, usage stats
api_page.create_key: Modal to create new API key with name input

monitoring_page.activity_chart: Area chart with Réservations and Syncs lines
monitoring_page.event_stream: Terminal-style log with event type, entity, priority badges
monitoring_page.event_filter: Dropdown to filter by event type

navigation.sub_nav: 6 tabs: Vue d'ensemble, Connecteurs, Synchronisation, Données Unifiées, API & Marketplace, Monitoring
